title: April 3
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 3''' is the 93rd day of the year (94th in leap years), with 272 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1932|1932]] – [[Colin Cantwell]] is born.
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Pat Proft]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Ben Mendelsohn]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Paul S. Kemp]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Cantina]] filmed in [[Ajim]].
*[[1989]] – [[James McArdle]] is born.
*[[2001]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' published.
*2001 – [[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] published.
*[[2002]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 14|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 14]] published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Echoes of the Jedi]]'' fourth adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.
*[[2012]] – '' [[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' released.
*2012 – ''[[Kinect Star Wars]]'' released.
*2012 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Magazine 11|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Magazine'' 11]] published.
*[[2013]] – [[Dark Times—Fire Carrier 3|''Dark Times—Fire Carrier'' 3]] released.
*2013 – [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] shuts down [[LucasArts]] and lays off its staff.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Welcome to the Star Wars Jungle]]'' published on [[StarWars.com]].
*2014 – [[Star Wars Comic 7.4|''Star Wars Comic'' 7.4]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Erik Bauersfeld]] dies.
*2016 – [[Don Francks]] dies.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia of Starfighters and Other Vehicles]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 64|''Star Wars'' (2015) 64]] published.
*2019 – [[Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation 7|''Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation'' 7]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Dangerous Debt]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2020 – "[[Rey and Finn vs. Kylo Ren]]" is uploaded on YouTube.
*[[2024]] – "[[Identity Crisis]]" and "[[Point of No Return (The Bad Batch)|Point of No Return]] air on Disney+.
*2024 – [[Star Wars (2020) 45|''Star Wars'' (2020) 45]] published.
<noinclude>
